subject: Escalation: apollo blockers for Canberra | Albert Einstein | Q3 review | INIT-2241
body: Please note the apollo stream in Canberra has shifted to a tighter timeline. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Publish a draft checklist for approvals, compliance, and rollout. Publish a draft checklist for approvals, compliance, and rollout. The retrospective section links this stream to lessons from Albert Einstein and Amelia Earhart. Reference initiative INIT-2241. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: handoff, review.
